/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/minimatch_coinbase_l2.dir/apps/coinbase_l2_client.cpp.o -o minimatch_coinbase_l2  libminimatch.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.3/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.3/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
